title: comparison in where clause (left-side multiplication, right-side cosine and sql function with column argument) crashes mserver5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE images (imageid SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ds_id INT, bmaj DOUBLE PRECISION);

CREATE TABLE xtrsrc (xtrsrcid SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, image_id INT REFERENCES images(imageid), zone INT, ra DOUBLE PRECISION, decl DOUBLE PRECISION, ra_err DOUBLE PRECISION, decl_err DOUBLE PRECISION, x DOUBLE PRECISION, y DOUBLE PRECISION, z DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO xtrsrc (image_id, zone, ra, decl, ra_err, decl_err, x, y, z) VALUES (1, 10, 100.0, 20.0, 0.1, 0.1, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5);
SELECT xtrsrcid FROM xtrsrc WHERE x * x + y * y + z * z > COS(RADIANS((SELECT bmaj FROM images WHERE imageid = 1)));
key_bug_features: comparison in where clause with multiplication and cosine
